call_agenda.description: Ordered list of call sections with time allocations and goals

warm_up_questions.description: 2-3 rapport-building, context-gathering questions specific to this prospect

discovery_questions.description: Discovery questions with MEDDIC dimension labels and follow-up probes

pivot_script.description: Verbatim or near-verbatim script for transitioning from discovery pain to value presentation

objection_handling.description: Common objections with specific recommended responses

next_step_close.description: Specific language for closing the call with a concrete next action

pre_call_research_notes.description: Summary of key facts the rep should have internalized before the call
